# CWE-618: Exposed Unsafe ActiveX Method (browser plugin analogue)
lang: go
file: CWE-618-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os/exec"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: HTTP endpoint exposes a privileged native helper without sandbox checks.
func InvokePluginMethod(c *gin.Context) {
	method := c.Query("method")
	args := c.Query("args")
	cmd := exec.Command("/opt/vendor/activex-bridge", method, args)
	out, err := cmd.CombinedOutput()
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, string(out))
		return
	}
	c.String(http.StatusOK, string(out))
}
